LCA Filing Notifications
Note: All Labor Condition Application (LCA) filing notifications are posted for 10 business days or longer.
All LCAs are available for public inspection at the employer’s principal place of business: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory, B183, 7000 East Avenue, Livermore, California 94550.
